title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. Provides a medication based abortion (up to 10 weeks) and surgical abortion (up to 13 weeks + 6 days). This clinic also offers vasectomy procedures. 3579 Franklin Boulevard Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9:30am-6pm, Thursday 10:30am-6pm, Friday 8am-4pm (541) 344-9411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-9411 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 9:30am-6pm, Thursday 10:30am-6pm, Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: EmX stop on-site Services: Abortions Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sterilization * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - INFO FOR TEENS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE-SPRINGFIELD HEALTH CENTER
